requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — ZS / IEC 62133

summary.en: Zambia generally adopts IEC-based standards as Zambian Standards (ZS). For portable lithium cells and battery packs the relevant safety benchmark is IEC 62133-2 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries), typically adopted as a ZS reference. Where ZABS treats the product as a regulated/compulsory item, a test report demonstrating conformity to the adopted IEC 62133-2 standard (covering overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and forced-discharge abuse tests) is the common evidence basis for conformity assessment and import inspection. Exporters should confirm the exact ZS edition and whether ZABS requires testing by an accepted/accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 赞比亚通常将基于IEC的标准采纳为赞比亚标准（ZS）。对便携式锂电芯及电池组而言，相关安全基准为IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），通常作为ZS引用采纳。当ZABS将产品视为受管制／强制项目时，证明符合所采纳IEC 62133-2标准（涵盖过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及强制放电滥用测试）的检测报告，是合格评定与进口检验的常见证据基础。出口商应确认确切的ZS版本以及ZABS是否要求由其接受／认可的实验室进行测试。
summary.zht: 尚比亞通常將基於IEC的標準採納為尚比亞標準（ZS）。對便攜式鋰電芯及電池組而言，相關安全基準為IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），通常作為ZS引用採納。當ZABS將產品視為受管制／強制項目時，證明符合所採納IEC 62133-2標準（涵蓋過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及強制放電濫用測試）的檢測報告，是合格評定與進口檢驗的常見證據基礎。出口商應確認確切的ZS版本以及ZABS是否要求由其接受／認可的實驗室進行測試。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (adopted as a Zambian Standard / ZS reference)
ZABS conformity assessment / import inspection under the Standards Act

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), which is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Because Zambia adopts the IEC 62133-2 line directly as its reference, a GB 31241 report and an IEC 62133-2 report are closely related but not identical; ZABS conformity assessment is keyed to the IEC-adopted ZS, not to GB 31241 as such.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），其在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。由于赞比亚直接采纳IEC 62133-2作为引用标准，GB 31241报告与IEC 62133-2报告密切相关但并不相同；ZABS合格评定以采纳IEC的ZS为依据，而非以GB 31241本身为依据。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），其在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。由於尚比亞直接採納IEC 62133-2作為引用標準，GB 31241報告與IEC 62133-2報告密切相關但並不相同；ZABS合格評定以採納IEC的ZS為依據，而非以GB 31241本身為依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because Zambia adopts IEC 62133-2 directly, the cleanest evidence is an IEC 62133-2 test report (ideally CB Scheme, which Zambia/ZABS can recognise more readily than a national GB report). Key gaps: (1) GB 31241 has national deviations, so a GB report may not be accepted one-for-one — an IEC 62133-2 / CB report is preferable; (2) confirm with ZABS whether the lithium battery or power bank is on the regulated/compulsory-standard list at time of shipment; (3) confirm whether ZABS requires in-country sample inspection or accepts the foreign test report under its import conformity scheme. There is no EU-style CE/DoC obligation, but the ZABS mark may be required for regulated products.
gap.zh: 由于赞比亚直接采纳IEC 62133-2，最干净的证据是IEC 62133-2测试报告（最好为CB体系报告，相较国家GB报告更易被赞比亚／ZABS接受）。主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在国家偏差，GB报告未必能一对一被接受——IEC 62133-2／CB报告更佳；（2）发货时向ZABS确认锂电池或移动电源是否列入受管制／强制标准清单；（3）确认ZABS是否要求在地抽样检验，或在其进口合格方案下接受境外测试报告。不存在欧盟式CE/DoC义务，但受管制产品可能须加施ZABS标志。
gap.zht: 由於尚比亞直接採納IEC 62133-2，最乾淨的證據是IEC 62133-2測試報告（最好為CB體系報告，相較國家GB報告更易被尚比亞／ZABS接受）。主要差距：（1）GB 31241存在國家偏差，GB報告未必能一對一被接受——IEC 62133-2／CB報告更佳；（2）發貨時向ZABS確認鋰電池或行動電源是否列入受管制／強制標準清單；（3）確認ZABS是否要求在地抽樣檢驗，或在其進口合格方案下接受境外測試報告。不存在歐盟式CE/DoC義務，但受管制產品可能須加施ZABS標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — where ZABS treats the lithium battery/power bank as a regulated/compulsory-standard product, conformity to the adopted IEC 62133-2 (ZS) must be demonstrated for import inspection; ZABS mark may be required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zambia adopts the IEC 62133-2 safety line as its reference standard. The preferred evidence is an IEC 62133-2 (ideally CB Scheme) test report rather than a GB 31241 report, because GB 31241 has national deviations and is not keyed to ZABS conformity assessment. Exporters should confirm whether the product is on the ZABS regulated list, whether the ZABS mark applies, and whether foreign test reports are accepted under the import inspection scheme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 赞比亚采纳IEC 62133-2安全标准作为引用标准。首选证据为IEC 62133-2（最好为CB体系）测试报告，而非GB 31241报告，因为GB 31241存在国家偏差且不与ZABS合格评定挂钩。出口商应确认产品是否列入ZABS受管制清单、是否适用ZABS标志，以及进口检验方案是否接受境外测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尚比亞採納IEC 62133-2安全標準作為引用標準。首選證據為IEC 62133-2（最好為CB體系）測試報告，而非GB 31241報告，因為GB 31241存在國家偏差且不與ZABS合格評定掛鉤。出口商應確認產品是否列入ZABS受管制清單、是否適用ZABS標誌，以及進口檢驗方案是否接受境外測試報告。
